'''''Luke Skywalker's Race Against Time''''' was a young children's book telling a story about [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] flying his [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] against an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] ship headed to a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base. It was written by [[John Whitman]] and illustrated by [[Kilian Plunkett]].

As a [[Cruise Along Books|Cruise Along Book]], the book came packaged with a Micro Machines X-Ray Fleet miniature X-wing fighter.

==Plot summary==
Luke Skywalker leads a squad of fighters to destroy an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyer]] sent to attack a recently discovered Rebel supply base. The fighters fly through a flock of [[Mynock/Legends|mynocks]], and one attaches itself to Luke's X-wing. He shakes the mynock loose after nearly crashing and continues on with the other fighters. They destroy the Star Destroyer and head back to their base.
